landing.title: Preserve the glow of your warmest moments!
landing.subtitle_p1: Memories are like stars scattered across the night sky. Some shine brightly, others are barely visible, but together they weave a unique story...
landing.subtitle_p2: Organize your memories, share them with loved ones, and return to your brightest moments!
landing.cta_button: Create your own constellation of memories

image_upload.err_too_large: File is too large. Maximum 10 MB.

errors.short_pass: Password must contain at least 6 characters.
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.invalid_token: The link is invalid or has expired.
errors.reset_fail: Recovery failed. The link might be outdated.

forgot.title: Recover Access
forgot.subtitle_p1: Enter the email address you used during registration.
forgot.subtitle_p2: Instructions for resetting your password will be sent there.
forgot.spam_warning: If you don't see the email soon, check your Spam or Promotions folder.

reset.title: Create new password
reset.subtitle: Create a strong password of at least 6 characters to protect your memories!

status.invited: You have been invited to a group
status.accept_error: An error occurred while verifying the invitation

unauthorized.subtitle: To join and view memories, log in to your profile or create a new one.

userInfo.quote: "Looking at the starry sky, which memory would shine the brightest in your mind?"
userInfo.bio_placeholder: Add your answer while editing your profile...

create_modal.desc_placeholder: What is the story behind this space?..

page.err_no_memories: There are no memories in this group yet!

header.no_description: The creators of this group haven't added a description yet, but the memories collected here speak louder than words...

invite.title: Invite new members
invite.limit_alert_p1: This group has reached the limit of

messages.invite_invalid_email: Invalid email format. Please enter a valid email (e.g., name@gmail.com)

confirm_remove.title: Remove member?
confirm_remove.desc: Are you sure you want to remove "{{name}}" from this group?

posts_tab.empty_no_posts: No memories here yet. Create the first one!

post_detail_modal.empty_comments: No comments yet. Be the first to comment!

timeline_feed.empty_msg: Create your story and light up a constellation of memories in the night sky!
timeline_feed.err_fetch: Failed to load the timeline. Please try refreshing the page.

memories_tab.err_fetch_desc: Please try refreshing the page or come back later.
memories_tab.empty_desc: No memories with images were saved for this period in past years.
memories_tab.loading_milestones: Analyzing your contribution to the group...
memories_tab.title_reader: History of your interactions in the shared story:
memories_tab.title_contributor: Your bright contribution to creating the shared story:

download_modal.title: Save photo?
download_modal.desc_single: Are you sure you want to download this photo to your device?
download_modal.desc_plural: Are you sure you want to download {{count}} photos to your device?

errors.max_5_photos: You can upload a maximum of 5 photos.
errors.some_files_too_large: Some files are too large. Maximum 10 MB each.
errors.max_5_tags: You can add up to 5 tags.
errors.empty_post: Add text or at least one photo to save the memory!
errors.future_date: The event date cannot be in the future.
errors.future_date_input: You cannot select a date from the future!
errors.unsupported_file: Cannot process one of the photos. Check file formats.

delete_group_modal.title: Delete group?
delete_group_modal.desc_start: Are you sure you want to delete the group
delete_group_modal.desc_end: ? This action cannot be undone. All posts, photos, and comments will be permanently destroyed.

delete_post_modal.title: Delete this memory?
delete_post_modal.desc: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this post? All photos, comments, and reactions attached to it will also be destroyed.

leave_group_modal.title: Leave group?
leave_group_modal.desc: Are you sure you want to leave this group? You will lose access to all memories, photos, and member discussions.

client_errors.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please try refreshing the page.
client_errors.network: Could not connect to the server. Please check your internet connection or try again later.
client_errors.not_found: The requested information could not be found. It may have been deleted.

server_errors.USER_UPDATE_FAILED: Failed to update profile. Please try again later.
server_errors.AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID: Session expired. Please log in again.
server_errors.AUTH_EMAIL_EXISTS: A user with this email is already registered
server_errors.AUTH_GOOGLE_FAILED: Google authorization failed. Please try again.
server_errors.AUTH_RESET_TOKEN_INVALID: The link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
server_errors.AUTH_PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 6 characters long
server_errors.GROUP_NO_ACCESS: Your access has been changed, or you were removed from this constellation.
server_errors.GROUP_NOT_FOUND_OR_NO_ACCESS: Group not found or you do not have access
server_errors.GROUP_ADMIN_ROLE_REQUIRED: You do not have administrator rights for this action
server_errors.GROUP_DELETED: This constellation was permanently deleted by the owner.
server_errors.GROUP_CREATE_FAILED: Failed to create group. Please try again.
server_errors.GROUP_FETCH_FAILED: Failed to load groups. Please try again later.
server_errors.MEMBER_ADMIN_ROLE_REQUIRED: You do not have permission to change roles.
server_errors.MEMBER_CANNOT_CHANGE_OWN_ROLE: You cannot change your own role.
server_errors.MEMBER_REQUESTER_NOT_IN_GROUP: You are not a member of this group.
server_errors.MEMBER_TARGET_NOT_IN_GROUP: User not found in the group.
server_errors.MEMBER_OWNER_CANNOT_LEAVE: The owner cannot simply leave the group. You must delete it completely.
server_errors.MEMBER_ADMIN_ROLE_REQUIRED_TO_REMOVE: Only the owner can remove other members from the group.
server_errors.MEMBER_CANNOT_REMOVE_OWNER: It is not possible to remove the group owner.
server_errors.INVITE_ADMIN_ROLE_REQUIRED: Only the owner can invite members.
server_errors.INVITE_USER_ALREADY_IN_GROUP: This user is already in the group!
server_errors.INVITE_ALREADY_SENT: An invitation to this email has already been sent and is pending confirmation.
server_errors.INVITE_INVALID_OR_EXPIRED: The invitation is invalid, already used, or has expired.
server_errors.POST_CONTENT_TOO_LONG: The post content cannot exceed 500 characters.
server_errors.POST_TAGS_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: You can add up to 5 tags.
server_errors.POST_IMAGES_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: You can attach a maximum of 5 photos per post.
server_errors.POST_ACCESS_DENIED: You do not have access to this group.
server_errors.POST_PIN_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: The group already has the maximum number of pinned posts (3). Unpin one to pin a new one.
server_errors.POST_DELETE_FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to delete this post.
server_errors.UPLOAD_UNSUPPORTED_FILE: Unsupported file format. Please choose another one!
server_errors.UPLOAD_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: You can upload a maximum of 5 files!
server_errors.SERVER_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

server_success.AUTH_RESET_EMAIL_SENT: An email with instructions has been successfully sent.
server_success.AUTH_PASSWORD_RESET_SUCCESS: Your password has been successfully updated! Now you can log in.
server_success.GROUP_DELETED_SUCCESS: Group has been successfully and permanently deleted.
server_success.MEMBER_LEFT_SUCCESS: You have successfully left the group.
server_success.INVITE_ACCEPTED_SUCCESS: You have successfully joined the group!
